---
title: "Discord"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="discord-section">
  <p>The Moral Imagination and Hope Workshop uses Discord as our primary community
  space for ongoing discussions, reading groups, and event announcements.</p>

  <div class="discord-cta">
    <a href="https://discord.gg/YOUR-INVITE-CODE" class="discord-button" target="_blank">
      Join our Discord Server
    </a>
  </div>

  <p class="discord-note">Replace the link above with your actual Discord invite URL.</p>
</div>
```
